title: Budget plan revision and period lifecycle
content: NoBudgetPlan --> Draft: Create Draft in Current or Future
Draft --> Draft: Create another immutable Draft
Active --> Superseded: Activate another Draft atomically
Draft --> Draft: period becomes Closed; reads only
Active --> Active: period becomes Closed; reads only
note right of Draft: Payload immutable; zero rows explicit; omission absent
note right of Active: At most one per plan
note right of Superseded: History never deleted
